macro.title: New Fed Chair Warsh loses dove as Waller turns hawkish
macro.what: Markets pushed the 10-year yield up from 4.53% to 4.58% after Christopher Waller warned supply disruptions may continue.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Pending Home Sales Slip for First Time Since Early April as Mortgage Rates Climb
macro.what: Mortgage rates jumped to a 10-month high, spooking would-be homebuyers and sellers after a few weeks of solid demand
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Is a new portal model coming for our listing inventory?
housing.what: Google pilot is live in 8 markets, routing listing leads via ComeHome, raising questions on broker data use and future fees.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Just Listed in Chicago: A $1 Million Penthouse Condo in a Former Cookie Factory
housing.what: In this edition of Just Listed–a series from Redfin News that explores homes that are listed by Redfin or Compass agents on Redfin.com–we’re exploring a penthouse in Lincoln Park, Chicago
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: We have met one enemy of housing affordability … it is us
housing.what: America’s housing affordability debate has become one of those national arguments that sounds complete until you look at the product itself
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: From the credit crisis to AI: Kim Nelson on evolving through every market cycle
housing.what: Kim Nelson, CEO of BankSouth Mortgage, shares leadership insights on navigating disruption, embracing AI and building organizations that can adapt through every market cycle.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Study flags $880M in subordinate liens on 2023 vintage FHA mortgages
housing.what: Benutech finds 82K FHA loans originated in 2023 have other liens of $20K or less, totaling about $880M and complicating loss mitigation.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Raena Pinchuk joins CrossCountry Mortgage as sales manager
housing.what: CrossCountry Mortgage hired Raena Pinchuk as sales manager for Coeur d’Alene, Idaho, and the Pacific Northwest.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Thinking differently in the age of AI: Sara Holtz on leadership, clarity and building stronger teams
housing.what: Sara Holtz, chief marketing officer at Optimal Blue, shares leadership insights on AI, self-awareness and helping teams think differently in a rapidly evolving housing market.
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: Radian names Mike Weinbach CEO-elect with Rick Thornberry set to retire
housing.what: Mortgage insurer Radian named Mike Weinbach CEO-elect effective June 1 as Rick Thornberry plans to retire end of 2026.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Home Purchase Cancellations Are No Longer on the Rise As Demand Ticks Up
housing.what: Contract cancellations declined slightly in April as homebuyers and sellers gained a clearer sense of the housing market after years of volatility, and as demand picked up
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Coming Soon in Chicago: A $2M Move-In Ready Duplex Just Steps From Lake Michigan
housing.what: In this edition of Coming Soon–a series from Redfin News that explores new listings that house hunters can find early only on Redfin.com and Compass.com–we’re exploring a duplex unit in Chicago’s Lincoln Park
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

notables.title: Title insurance premium volume jumped nearly 14% in 2025
notables.what: The industry paid more than $667 million in claims during 2025, slightly down from $676 million paid in 2024.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Broker Public Portal expands Cribio as data control debate grows
notables.what: Broker Public Portal says Cribio is adding MLSs, supporting nearly 400,000 agents with three market launches planned next quarter.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.
